per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, my fever has been intermittent and tends to get worse at night, around 38.2°C (100.8°F), and I've also been experiencing fatigue and malaise, which is why I've had to miss three days of work. I'm really concerned about this because it's affecting my daily life and I just want to feel better!

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Thank you for sharing that. I really appreciate your honesty. Does the discomfort stay in one place or does it spread anywhere?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The right side of my chest has been hurting, it's a sharp pain that gets worse when I breathe deeply or cough. It's been bothering me quite a bit, and to be honest, it's making me even more anxious about what might be going on with my health.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Is there anything you've been hesitant to tell me? I promise there's no judgment here.
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I guess I haven't mentioned my maternal grandmother passing away from lung cancer. It's a family history concern for me, and it makes me even more anxious about these symptoms.
